creator: arichardson@FreeBSD.org
text:
Support for this recently landed in upstream LLD: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/commit/b4744d306c0a21933d4339fa4fb497866a36ee49#diff-050be97050a41e1b5f83c19795b5e33d (and is on by default since https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/commit/ae0294375f3c405aab99f7c75acb0001ecfb2297#diff-050be97050a41e1b5f83c19795b5e33d).

This should be part of ld.lld 9.0 (but it might be possible to backport those patches).
